name: Chest MRI
description: MRI of the chest for evaluation of mediastinal, pleural, and chest wall pathology

findings.technique: MRI of the chest was performed with T1, T2, and STIR sequences in multiple planes.
findings.comparison: No prior studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Mediastinum
sections.content: The mediastinum demonstrates [no mass / no adenopathy / no abnormal signal]. The great vessels are [patent / normal].

sections.name: Heart
sections.content: The heart demonstrates [normal signal / no mass / no pericardial effusion]. The chamber walls are [normal / no thickening].

sections.name: Lungs
sections.content: The lungs demonstrate [no masses / no abnormal signal / no consolidation]. No pleural-based masses.

sections.name: Pleura
sections.content: The bilateral pleura demonstrate [no thickening / no effusion / no masses].

sections.name: Chest Wall
sections.content: The chest wall demonstrates [no mass / no infiltration / no abnormal signal]. No rib involvement.

impression:
1. Normal chest MRI.
2. No mediastinal, pleural, or chest wall abnormality identified.
